## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Test Evidence

- [ ] `make setup`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] Other:

## Frontend Screenshots or Recordings

Add screenshots or recordings for user-visible frontend changes, or write
`Not applicable`.

## Migrations and Data Changes

Describe database migrations, backfills, infrastructure changes, seed data, or
configuration changes. Write `None` when not applicable.

## Documentation Updates

- [ ] Product behavior, architecture, commands, or conventions were updated in
      documentation.
- [ ] No documentation update is needed.

## Security and Tenant Isolation

- Security-sensitive behavior changed:
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] No
- Tenant-isolation impact:
  - [ ] New or changed tenant-scoped reads, writes, jobs, storage paths,
        retrieval, logs, reports, or exports.
  - [ ] No tenant-isolation impact.

Explain the server-side tenant-isolation checks, denial tests, and any AI/RAG
grounding or retrieval guardrails affected by this change.
